title: PNF-404
description: Adds Pikmin & other Creatures from the Pikmin Series into Minecraft
body:
![Pikmin In a forest](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b2b3ecc669df0e994bf93bc3aeb61a3bd6deff90.webp)

This Mod requires [Geckolib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib)

For Updates and News check [PNF404`s Twitter Account](https://x.com/PNF404Mod)

# Pikmin

![All The Pikmin](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c1b87568778e206c11283590588a1b4e25496a1d.png)

Pikmin are small creatures that can vary in color and abilities, when Pikmin are fed Nectar they will fight alongside you and follow you

## Red Pikmin
Red Pikmin are found in Plains biomes, They are immune to fire!

## Yellow Pikmin
Yellow Pikmin are found in Desert and Savanna Biomes, They are immune to electricity and are fast

## Blue Pikmin
Blue Pikmin are found in Rivers and The Ocean, They are the only pikmin that can swim

## Purple Pikmin
Purple Pikmin are found in Caves, They are very strong but also slow

## White Pikmin
White Pikmin are also found in Caves, They are Immune to poison and are venomous but smaller

## Winged Pikmin
Winged Pikmin are found in Cherry Blossom Biomes, They can fly!

## Rock Pikmin
Rock Pikmin are found on Mountains, They are immune to explosions & projectiles

## Ice Pikmin
Ice Pikmin can be found in Cold Biomes, When they attack an enemy they have a small chance to freeze them, they can also freeze water when walking on it.

## Glow Pikmin
Glow Pikmin can be spawned from a Lumiknoll, they can fly and are immune to most damage, but they will wither away if under the sun too long

## Bulbmin
Bulbmin are found in caves they are immune to Fire, Electricity and Water but they will die if under the sun too long


# Creatures

![Creatures](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7f20e25c6ad579b7b423b1d4df4f4ff95f4a4f40_0.webp)


## Bulborbs

Bulborbs come in 5 variants, Dwarf, Regular, Dwarf Orange, Orange, & Frosty, the Regular and Dwarf Bulborbs are found in Plains Biomes, Orange Bulborbs are found in Desert Biomes and Frosty Bulborbs are found in Cold Biomes

## Puffmin
Puffmin are found in the Mushrooms Fields biome, they will attack the player when close

## Yellow Space Dog

Yellow Space Dogs can be found in Taiga biomes, When fed a bone you can ride them and they`ll attack with you

## Wollyhops
Wollyhops can be found in Swamp Biomes & Chillyhops can be found in Cold Biomes, When provoked Wollyhops jump up in the air and try to crush the player

## Blowhogs
Blowhogs can be found in 4 different variants, Firey, Watery, Icy, And Puffy, they will shoot at the player and the player`s Pikmin

## Mamuta
Mamutas can be found in Flower Forests, they are not hostile but will apply bonemeal on the ground when angered

## Man-at-Legs
Man-at-Legs can be found in their arena underground, it will shoot at the player, it will drop some ingots when defeated


# Extra

![A Player Riding a Yellow Space Dog](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/59f1063366d68a38c8c005dc56376df75a73e7fc.png)

## Nectar & Nectar Eggs

Nectar Eggs can be found all throughout the Overworld, When broken they drop nectar, Nectar can be used to tame Pikmin or heal them but its also a good food item


## Hocotate Spacesuits

Spacesuits worn by Employees of Hocotate, They come in 7 different colors

## Future Plans
Disclaimer : These may or may not be added

- More Enemies & Bosses
- Better way to Tame Pikmin
- Decor Pikmin
- Caves (maybe a seperate mod)
  

## Known Issues

- Pikmin sometimes can become invisble, I do not know why this happens but it can be fixed by exiting and reopening the world


##

**This Mod is currently only uploaded on Modrinth & Curseforge, if you found this mod on any other website it was put there without my permission and could potentially be dangerous**
